title: Evangelion Characters
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Characters             Quote Post by Darius » Thu Aug 31, 2006 4:43 pm I don't really know if there is a thread here with the same name os a similar name...but the intent I had here when I made it was to talk about characters one at a time...from what color underwear they wear (lol) to how deep or how complex their minds are... So yes, basically anything revolving a character. I'd prefer if there would be pretty long discussions for each character. Some debating would be good too I suppose... Anyway's, you guys choose which character you wish to talk about first..and when the time comes, if the discussion for that specific character ends, I suppose i'll choose that one I want to talk about. Hope this thread helps out and inspires friendly debating and that some people would learn some things. =)

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Thu Aug 31, 2006 4:48 pm There's really nothing to seperate this thread from the rest of the board-you'll find loads of loads of threads talking about every individual character, and any connections have already been made.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Aug 31, 2006 4:59 pm Asuka wears white panties.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Thu Aug 31, 2006 5:29 pm I CAME! Not. <_< Anyhow, we know that Eva-01 is gay. Purple is OBVIOUSLY the PRIDE color, and that horn is also a phallic reference. Also, Misato keeps a crowbar under her pillow. Seele plays Dungeon and Dragons. Rei is a potato. And of course, who could forget that Gendou's a pimp and Pen^2's the one who threw the LoL @ Asuka in 25'?

[]:             Quote Post by Darius » Thu Aug 31, 2006 5:56 pm right..well the point was to have all those different ideas and connections in one specific thread... But whatever...

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Thu Aug 31, 2006 6:28 pm Keel rolls 20's.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 31, 2006 11:10 pm Monkey, does this count as "creating threads for the sake of creating threads"? I'll let you decide...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Sep 01, 2006 1:24 am Rei wears white panties. Hey, I was on topic...

[]:             Quote Post by badc0de » Fri Sep 01, 2006 2:52 am Toji: [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL] Baby-blue/white striped shorts :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Fri Sep 01, 2006 3:22 am Too big or too small for Asuka? You decide.

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Mon Sep 04, 2006 8:16 pm Mundane wrote: Too big or too small for Asuka? You decide.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon Sep 04, 2006 8:28 pm Asuka's from Germany. I'm sure she's seen bigger. Err, wait a sec, she's only 14. That was probably the first she'd ever seen. :P

So yes, basically anything revolving a character. I'd prefer if there would be pretty long discussions for each character. Some debating would be good too I suppose... Anyway's, you guys choose which character you wish to talk about first..and when the time comes, if the discussion for that specific character ends, I suppose i'll choose that one I want to talk about. Hope this thread helps out and inspires friendly debating and that some people would learn some things. =)
